features: FRAGRANCE NOTES - Citrus, Fruity, Floral, Amber.

Sense your AOURA, a range of elegant scents that reveal blends of rich jewel tones to align with your inner and outer energy – individual to you. ​ Encased in an alluring bottle that reflects energetic colours - just as the fierce woman inside you does too.

HOW MANY SPRAYS? - Each 100ml Aoura Secret Envy EDP contains over 900 sprays, representing 90 days' supply based on a 5 sprays 3 times a day. Scent should last for an estimated 6 hours after spraying.
RECYCLABLE - Aoura Secret Envy Eau De Parfum 100ml comes in a recyclable glass bottle.

UNVEIL AOURA - AOURA LONDON offers a touch of opulence without the hefty price tag, redefining luxury by making it accessible to all, without compromising on quality. Elevate your fragrance game with our exquisite range of women's Body Mists and Eau De Parfum’s, designed to leave a mark wherever you go.
description: Product Description *Recyclable Bottles: (August, 2022) Our Aoura London EDP collection range comes in recyclable plastic (PET) bottles (polyethylene terephthalate)
